name: Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data
description: The code transmits data to another actor, but a portion of the data includes sensitive information that should not be accessible to that actor. This can expose credentials, private communications, or system architecture details useful for further exploitation.
detection_pattern: Look for STORAGE nodes containing sensitive data (credentials, PII, internal state) flowing to an EGRESS node (HTTP response, API response, network transmission) without a TRANSFORM node (data sanitization/redaction) or CONTROL node (access check) ensuring sensitive fields are stripped before transmission.
